_note: Stock-safe conceptual vocabulary for 'A Barista's Morning'. ALL categories are identity_sensitive=false and proof_critical=false — this is the stock-safe case, so conceptual must_include + stock_bridge fallback is legitimate (no honesty-rule violation). Test: swapping this vocab should swap the genre without touching the chain.

categories.label: City at Dawn
categories.description: Empty city streets at sunrise, soft light
categories.collection_instructions: Wide establishing of a quiet city waking up; warm low sun

categories.label: Cafe Ambient
categories.description: Cafe interior, steam, machines warming up, ambient room tone
categories.collection_instructions: Room tone + espresso machine hiss; keep original audio for atmosphere

categories.label: Hands at Work
categories.description: Close-up hands grinding, tamping, pouring coffee
categories.collection_instructions: Tight close-ups of the craft; montage-friendly fast cuts

categories.label: Pour Detail
categories.description: Slow pour / latte art / crema close-up
categories.collection_instructions: Hero pour shot; brief diegetic pour sound ducked under music

categories.label: People Walking
categories.description: Anonymous people walking, street life, customers arriving
categories.collection_instructions: Backs/silhouettes only, no recognizable faces; montage filler

categories.label: Finished Cup
categories.description: The finished cup of coffee on a counter, warm resolution
categories.collection_instructions: Hold on the finished cup; closing beat, warm window light
